title: orthantha lutea
intro: Orthantha lutea, also known as the yellow orchid grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Orthantha lutea include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and aid in the removal of mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of Orthantha lutea are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
